title: Promises, Async Functions, and the Event Loop · Language Lens: Event Loop Jobs
summary: Coordinate status requests, deadlines, retries, and user cancellation without races or unhandled failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js event loop jobs increment in a bounded asynchronous status coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace call stack, task, microtask, rendering, and worker boundaries without treating timing as random.
Release listeners, timers, streams, locks, and disposable resources on success, failure, and cancellation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
